kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then User Should See Success Message
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'You logged into a secure area!'.
kw.arg: You logged into a secure area!
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: TC_002 Login With Invalid Password

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: When User Enters Valid Username And Invalid Password
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then User Should See Password Error Message
Verify Error Password Message Is Displayed
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//div[@id='flash' and contains(text(), 'Your password is invalid!')]' did not appear in 10 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Element 'xpath=//div[@id='flash' and contains(text(), 'Your password is invalid!')]' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.status: Element 'xpath=//div[@id='flash' and contains(text(), 'Your password is invalid!')]' did not appear in 10 seconds.
Element 'xpath=//div[@id='flash' and contains(text(), 'Your password is invalid!')]' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: And User Should Remain On Login Page
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: Element 'xpath=//div[@id='flash' and contains(text(), 'Your password is invalid!')]' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: When User Enters Invalid Username And Valid Password
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then User Should See Username Error Message
Verify Error Username Message Is Displayed
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'Your username is invalid!'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: And User Should Remain On Login Page
Verify User Remains On Login Page
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
